The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Restless Chapel

Energies warp time locally.
Reinforcements buckle externally.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • please let me go I just want to see my family again

  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
